text: The contractor shall submit the work programme for OHE catenary installation within 14 days of contract award.
Ballastless track slab works must comply with the approved quality plan and vibration criteria for station platforms.
The employer may instruct design variation for tunnel boring machine alignment before Stage 2 execution.
All permanent works involving track turnouts shall be tested under dynamic load prior to handover.
The contractor is responsible for maintaining the temporary OHE catenary support system during commissioning.
Claims for delay due to TBM breakdown must be submitted with manufacturer diagnostic reports.
The subcontractor shall ensure ballastless track joints are sealed to prevent water ingress.
The engineer will review NCR resolutions related to station cavern fire safety provisions.
Payment certificates for underground segmental lining will be issued after TBM shield retrieval.
Contractor warranties shall cover 24 months of remedial work on track slab surfacing.
The contractor shall prepare a detailed OHE catenary risk assessment before energization.
All station fit-out materials shall meet the approved DMRC specifications for corrosion resistance.
Temporary works for TBM launch pits must be designed to resist groundwater inflow.
Contractor shall submit concrete mix designs for ballastless track slab to the engineer.
The employer may require additional testing of OHE catenary tensioning after monsoon season.
The contractor must coordinate TBM operations with station ventilation system commissioning.
Quality control for track slab finishing shall include flatness and alignment measurements.
The contractor shall provide documentation for all NCR closures related to tunnel lining integration.
The engineer may order rework of ballastless track if test results do not meet tolerance limits.
The contractor shall ensure that OHE catenary supports are installed without exceeding clearance limits.
All materials for station interiors must match the approved DMRC colour and durability schedule.
The contractor shall arrange TBM maintenance during planned shutdown windows only.
The engineer may reject any ballastless track slab section exhibiting hairline cracks.
The contractor must manage temporary power supply during OHE catenary commissioning.
All site staff shall comply with safety procedures while working adjacent to the tunnel boring machine.
The contractor shall include FCA for station electrical rooms in the final handover package.
The engineer may require additional inspection of the OHE catenary after crane operations.
The contractor shall submit TBM slurry disposal plans in accordance with environmental permits.
The contractor must maintain access paths for NCR inspections around track slab areas.
Test certificates for station lighting shall be included in the final OHE catenary package report.
The contractor shall replace damaged ballastless track components at their own cost.
The employer may postpone TBM launch if site conditions are deemed unsafe.
Track slab concreting must proceed only after the engineer approves the formwork.
The contractor shall submit OHE catenary equipment certificates from the supplier.
All NCR responses must be recorded in the project quality management system.
The contractor shall provide a contingency plan for TBM cutterhead replacement.
The engineer may require additional curing time for ballastless track slab surfaces.
The contractor shall confirm OHE catenary clearance after structural modifications.
The contractor must maintain TBM spoil disposal records for audit.
The engineer may require hourly monitoring of ballastless track temperature during curing.
The contractor shall coordinate OHE catenary installation with signalling cable routing.
The employer may withhold payment for unresolved NCRs related to station waterproofing.
The contractor shall provide as-built drawings for tunnel boring machine alignment.
All ballastless track slab joints shall be sealed to prevent ingress from the platform area.
The contractor shall include emergency evacuation measures for station cavern construction.
The engineer may require additional inspection of OHE catenary supports after rainfall.
The contractor shall submit TBM vibration monitoring data weekly.
The contractor shall ensure track slab edges are protected during station finishing works.
The engineer may issue a stop-work order for non-compliant OHE catenary erection.
The contractor shall complete all NCR corrective actions before final acceptance.
NCR issued for damaged OHE catenary hanger at the platform edge.
NCR issued for grout separation in ballastless track slab near tunnel portal.
NCR issued for incomplete TBM shield locking mechanism documentation.
NCR issued for poor joint alignment between track slab segments.
NCR issued for missing insulation on OHE catenary conductor clamps.
NCR issued for water seepage in station cavern ceiling.
NCR issued for uneven ballastless track surface in the depot yard.
NCR issued for missing safety barrier around tunnel boring machine staging area.
NCR issued for incomplete welding records on OHE catenary support brackets.
NCR issued for exposed reinforcement in ballastless track edge beams.
NCR issued for dust accumulation inside the station cavern ventilation ducts.
NCR issued for incorrect TBM slurry disposal route signage.
NCR issued for damaged platform edge finishing adjacent to the track slab.
NCR issued for missing torque checks on OHE catenary clamp assemblies.
NCR issued for incorrect gradient at the ballastless track transition zone.
NCR issued for damaged concrete finish in the tunnel boring machine launch pit.
NCR issued for missing fire seal in station cavern cable trays.
NCR issued for non-conforming OHE catenary isolation switch installation.
NCR issued for poor finishing of ballastless track joints near the depot entry.
NCR issued for incomplete inspection of the tunnel boring machine cutterhead.
NCR issued for missing warning signage during OHE catenary maintenance.
NCR issued for inadequate moisture protection in the ballastless track slab.
NCR issued for improper storage of TBM tooling near station B.
NCR issued for missing erosion control at the OHE catenary foundation.
NCR issued for poor sealing of ballastless track expansion joints.
DPR records completion of OHE catenary pole erection at Station C with signalling coordination.
DPR notes ballastless track slab casting progressed in the depot, with curing operations ongoing.
DPR reports tunnel boring machine advance of 32 meters and successful segmental lining installation.
DPR describes final inspection of station cavern ventilation ducts and fire dampers.
DPR indicates electrical testing of OHE catenary feeders and system grounding checks.
DPR summarizes night shift work on ballastless track alignment and concrete surface finishing.
DPR documents TBM cutterhead replacement and debris removal from the launch shaft.
DPR reports completion of station concourse waterproofing and platform edge trimming.
DPR records that OHE catenary tensioning tests are scheduled for tomorrow morning.
DPR states ballastless track slab void filling is underway at the eastbound turnout.
DPR notes coordination with control room staff for tunnel boring machine emergency drills.
DPR describes contractor briefing on ballastless track maintenance procedures.
DPR indicates progress on station finishing and preparation for OHE catenary energization.
DPR reports TBM slurry separation unit maintenance and feed stock inspection.
DPR records the installation of ballastless track drainage channels and grouting checks.
DPR summarizes station passenger access ramp works and barrier rail installation.
DPR notes completion of OHE catenary foundation concreting in the yard area.
DPR records testing of ballastless track slab stiffness and settlement monitoring.
DPR reports health and safety audit on tunnel boring machine operations.
DPR states that OHE catenary stringing will begin once clearance tests are passed.
DPR documents ballastless track quality checks and measurement of expansion joint gaps.
DPR summarizes training for staff on tunnel boring machine emergency stoppage procedures.
DPR records the installation of station fire alarm wiring and cable tray routing.
DPR notes completion of ballastless track joint sealing at the depot turnout.
DPR records final walk-through of station fit-out and readiness for OHE catenary systems inspection.
